# CapabilityNegotiation.MayUseSamplingTools method

A server MUST NOT supply sampling `tools`/`toolChoice` unless `sampling.tools` is present (R-6.2-q). Mirrors TS `mayUseSamplingTools`.

```csharp
public static bool MayUseSamplingTools(JsonObject clientCaps)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| clientCaps | The client's declared capabilities. |

## Return Value

`true` when sampling tools may be supplied.
